name: DMSO (Dimethyl sulfoxide)

sds_facts.storage: Store at room temperature, tightly sealed. Do not store in polystyrene containers. Store in glass for long-term stocks.

bench_knowledge: Liquids with freeze points at or above 15°C (DMSO ~19°C, glycerol ~18°C) can solidify partially or fully in a 4°C cold room or on ice. Pipetting a partially-solidified liquid causes systematic volume errors. The physical_state guard prevents the rule from misfiring on solids whose melting point happens to be reported in freeze_point_C (e.g. NaOH pellets, PFA powder).

DMSO rapidly penetrates intact skin and carries dissolved solutes transdermally, making skin contact with DMSO drug stocks a real toxicity exposure route. Polystyrene is leached by DMSO over hours-to-days; use glass or polypropylene for stock storage.
